message:
🐛 Fix ClusterDetailModal rendering inside card

Use React Portal (createPortal) to render the ClusterDetailModal at
document.body level instead of inside the card component. This ensures
the modal appears as a proper overlay when clicking clusters in the
ClusterHealth card, regardless of any CSS containing rules on ancestor
elements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
